ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline Approaching
ham.body:
Hi Team,

This is a friendly reminder that the final project for our semester is due next Friday, April 19th. Please make sure your code, documentation, and presentation slides are submitted to the course portal by 11:59 PM. Late submissions may incur a penalty of 10% per day.

If you have any questions or need clarification, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,
Professor Smith

spam.subject: Action Required: FedEx Delivery Fee Pending
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking #123456789) was delayed and has not been delivered. To avoid return of the package to the sender, please pay the outstanding delivery fee of $45.00 within 72 hours. Failure to do so will result in additional charges and potential return of the package.

Click <URL> to complete the payment securely.

Thank you for choosing FedEx.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Support
